description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script consisting of "make all", creates the directory /usr/share/prv/, and symlinks the repository's makefiles and templates directories into /usr/share/prv/. Define six jobs (extension_changed, linked_extension_changed, project, redirect, template, template_in_folder) that all run in the default stage. The extension_changed job runs "bin/main -y main.hpp" then "test main.h". The linked_extension_changed job runs "bin/main -y main.cpp" then "test main.h". The project job runs "bin/main c test" then "test test/Makefile". The redirect job runs "bin/main -y main.f03" then "test main.f03". The template job runs "bin/main -y main.c" then "test main.c" and "test main.h". The template_in_folder job runs "bin/main -y test/main.c" then "test test/main.c" and "test test/main.h". Use the default GitLab runner image, no services, no caches, no artifacts, and no branch or tag restrictions.
